    Enum AutoShapeType

    Specifies the type of an auto shape (preset geometry).

    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public enum AutoShapeType

    Fields

    Name Description
    BentConnector

    Bent connector (prst="bentConnector2" or "bentConnector3").
    Cloud

    Cloud (prst="cloud").
    Cube

    Cube (prst="cube").
    CurvedConnector

    Curved connector (prst="curvedConnector2" or "curvedConnector3").
    Cylinder

    Cylinder (prst="cyl").
    Diamond

    Diamond (prst="diamond").
    DownArrow

    Down arrow (prst="downArrow").
    Ellipse

    Ellipse / oval (prst="ellipse").
    Heart

    Heart (prst="heart").
    Hexagon

    Hexagon (prst="hexagon").
    LeftArrow

    Left arrow (prst="leftArrow").
    LeftRightArrow

    Left-right arrow (prst="leftRightArrow").
    Lightning

    Lightning bolt (prst="lightningBolt").
    MathPlus

    Mathematical plus sign (prst="mathPlus").
    Moon

    Moon (prst="moon").
    Octagon

    Octagon (prst="octagon").
    Pentagon

    Pentagon (prst="pentagon").
    Plus

    Plus sign (prst="plus").
    Rectangle

    Rectangle (prst="rect").
    RightArrow

    Right arrow (prst="rightArrow").
    RightTriangle

    Right triangle (prst="rtTriangle").
    RoundedRectangle

    Rounded rectangle (prst="roundRect").
    Star10Point

    10-point star (prst="star10").
    Star12Point

    12-point star (prst="star12").
    Star16Point

    16-point star (prst="star16").
    Star24Point

    24-point star (prst="star24").
    Star32Point

    32-point star (prst="star32").
    Star4Point

    4-point star (prst="star4").
    Star5Point

    5-point star (prst="star5").
    Star6Point

    6-point star (prst="star6").
    Star7Point

    7-point star (prst="star7").
    Star8Point

    8-point star (prst="star8").
    StraightConnector

    Straight line connector (prst="straightConnector1").
    Sun

    Sun (prst="sun").
    TextBox

    Text box (prst="rect" with text body; represented as a distinct type for API clarity).
    Triangle

    Triangle (prst="triangle").
    Unknown

    Shape type is not one of the recognized presets.
    UpArrow

    Up arrow (prst="upArrow").
    UpDownArrow

    Up-down arrow (prst="upDownArrow").
